description: Two separate desktop programs sharing the NR2 HAL hub office channel.

programs.title: NewRidgeFinancial 2.0
roles: HAL command center — main hub for practice-wide office messages and monitoring

messageFlow: Every office PC runs StartWorkstation, names itself (Frontdesk 1, Room 2, etc.), and heartbeats to HAL hub every 30s.
Station staff send messages via StartWorkstation → POST /api/hal-hub/inbound on the HAL hub PC (Start Program, port 8765).
HAL hub queues inbound, dispatches to shared office-channel.json, and when speak:true ducks office music and announces once on hub speakers (Python SAPI).
All LAN workstations poll GET /api/office-channel on the hub URL (NR2_HAL_HUB_URL). SideNotes watchers remain supported and merge into the HAL station roster.
Set NR2_OFFICE_HUB_DATA to a shared network folder so hub + all workstations use the same office-channel and station registry when not using HTTP relay alone.

environment.NR2_HAL_HUB_URL: On each workstation: hub PC LAN URL (e.g. http://192.168.1.50:8765). Hub PC auto-advertises LAN IP when unset.
environment.NR2_OFFICE_HUB_DATA: Shared directory for hal-hub-inbound.json, office-channel.json, office-stations.json (default app_data/nr2/office)
environment.NR2_HAL_HUB_DUCK_MUSIC: 1 to duck background music during hub announcements (default 1)
environment.NR2_HAL_HUB_VOICE_STYLE: SAPI voice style for hub announcer (default hal9000)
